mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.iid, a.factory, a.storage, a.source, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.lotdate as bdate, b.spec, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC, a.itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) t WHERE rn_barcode = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY ymdhms DESC, itemcode

SELECT DISTINCT sdate FROM t_wms_realstock WHERE useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(storage) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT STORAGE FROM T_WMS_WAREHOUSE WHERE MEMO2 = '사내' )
AND UPPER(storage) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT STORAGE FROM T_WMS_WAREHOUSE WHERE MEMO2 = '사외' )
AND SUBSTR(sdate, 1, 7) = #{yearMonth}
ORDER BY sdate

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, b.spec FROM ( select * from ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) t WHERE rn_barcode = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec )

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.source, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, b.spec, a.lotdate as bdate FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) t WHERE rn_barcode = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC, a.itemcode

SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, b.spec FROM ( select * from ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ORDER BY a.sdate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT SUM(a.qty) AS total_qty FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
SELECT A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, A.ITEMNAME, A.LOCATION, A.LASTSTATUS FROM V_STOCKINFO_N A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode}

select useyn, sdate, kind, barcode, factory, storage, mktime as time, location, work, qty, laststatus, loginid , labeltype, partbarcode, custcode, custname, memo from v_itemhistory v where v.barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_WMS_LOCATION A SET USEYN = 'Y' , MEMO_D = '' , YMDHMS_D = '' WHERE A.IID=( SELECT MAX(B.IID) FROM T_WMS_LOCATION B WHERE B.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND B.USEYN = 'N' AND B.MEMO_D = #{memo_d} )
UPDATE T_WMS_REALSTOCK SET useyn = 'N' , ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , memo_d = 'STOCKCOUNT_D' WHERE IID = #{iid}
mapper.select:
WITH base_data AS ( SELECT a.intf_yn, a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, a.itemcode, b.spec as oitemcode, b.itemname, a.invoiceno, a.mes_key, a.qty, a.custcode AS custcode, a.custname AS custname, c.subname AS car FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1
AND a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.useyn = 'N'
AND a.source = 'INCOMING'
), total_info AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a3.sdate || '_' || a3.factory || '_' || a3.storage || '_' || a3.itemcode || '_' || a3.invoiceno) AS total_count, NVL(SUM(a3.qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM t_wms_inbound a3 LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b3 ON a3.itemcode = b3.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c3 ON b3.carno = c3.subcode AND c3.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1
AND a3.useyn = 'Y'
AND a3.useyn = 'N'
AND a3.source = 'INCOMING'
) SELECT bd.intf_yn AS INTF_YN, bd.sdate AS SDATE, CASE WHEN bd.custcode = '0039' THEN 'FREE' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS TYPE, bd.factory AS FACTORY, bd.storage AS STORAGE, bd.custcode AS CUSTCODE, bd.custname AS CUSTNAME, bd.car AS CAR, bd.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, bd.oitemcode AS OITEMCODE, bd.itemname AS ITEMNAME, SUM(bd.qty) AS QTY, MAX(ti.total_count) AS TOTALCOUNT, MAX(ti.total_qty) AS TOTALQTY FROM base_data bd CROSS JOIN total_info ti WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY bd.intf_yn, bd.sdate, bd.factory, bd.storage, bd.custcode, bd.custname, bd.car, bd.itemcode, bd.oitemcode, bd.itemname ORDER BY bd.sdate DESC, bd.itemcode
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT a.iid, a.intf_yn, a.sdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.type, nvl(a.custcode,(SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1)) AS custcode, nvl(a.custname,(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE CU_CODE = (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1))) as custname, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.source3, a.dock, a.invoiceno, a.container, b.spec, a.mes_key as meskey, a.source2, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOAD'
ORDER BY SDATE DESC, YMDHMS DESC, BARCODE

SELECT x.*, SUM(x.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.intf_yn,
NVL( a.custcode, ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_sm_salecustprice WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) AS custcode, NVL( a.custname, ( SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_sm_salecustprice WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) AS custname, a.source3, a.dock, a.container, a.invoiceno, a.source2, b.spec FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOAD'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.storage, c.subname, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.factory, a.intf_yn, a.custcode, a.custname, a.dock, a.source3, a.container, a.invoiceno, a.source2, b.spec ) x ORDER BY x.sdate DESC, itemcode

SELECT A.SDATE, A.CARTBARCODE, A.ASSYBARCODE, A.ASSYQTY, B.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, A.SOURCE, COUNT(DISTINCT A.CARTBARCODE) OVER () AS TOTALCARTQTY, SUM(A.ASSYQTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_VALIDATION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.SPEC = A.OITEMCODE and b.deldate = ' ' WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.CARTBARCODE, A.ASSYBARCODE

SELECT SDATE, LINE, TIME, COUNT(SEQ) AS SEQ, SUM(QTY) AS QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN COMPLETEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS YQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN COMPLETEYN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NQTY FROM T_WMS_SEQUENCE WHERE USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY SDATE, LINE, TIME ORDER BY SDATE DESC, LINE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WMS_SEQUENCE ( SDATE, J, HALC, SKID, PRODUCTCODE, SPEC, ITEMNAME, TIME, SEQ, QTY, LINE, YMDHMS, OP1, OP2, OP3, OP4 ) VALUES ( #{sdate}, #{j}, #{halc}, #{skid}, #{productcode}, #{spec}, #{itemname}, #{time}, #{seq}, #{qty}, #{line}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{op1}, #{op2}, #{op3}, #{op4} )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.SDATE, A.COMPLETEYN, A.HALC, A.SPEC, A.ITEMNAME, A.OP4, A.TIME, A.SEQ, A.QTY, B.COLORCODE, B.ROW1_LH_CODE, B.ROW1_RH_CODE, B.ROW2_LH_CODE, B.ROW2_RH_CODE, B.ROW2_CTR_CODE, B.ROW3_LH_CODE, B.ROW3_RH_CODE, B.ROW3_CTR_CODE FROM T_WMS_SEQUENCE A LEFT JOIN T_WMS_SEQUENCE_INFO B ON A.HALC = B.LX2_PE_CODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.TIME, A.SEQ
